title: Farmless
description: A Faithless Addon that integrates a few mods surrounding farming
body:
This pack is designed to add Faithless support to many different farming mods. Now you can enjoy all the fun textures of Faithless without having it clash with JAPPA textures.

Currently only [Harvest Scythes](https://modrinth.com/mod/harvest-scythes) is partially supported,

Here are some of the other PLANNED mods
- [Overweight Farming](https://modrinth.com/mod/overweight-farming)
- [Enhanced Celestials](https://modrinth.com/mod/enhanced-celestials)
- [Farmers Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight-fabric)

NOTE: If using Fabric/Quilt, DO NOT USE the latest version, try using Fabric API 0.88.1 and older if possible.

[Faithless](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/faithless) is created by [StitchSprites](https://modrinth.com/user/StitchSprites); Check out their other [PROJECTS](https://linktr.ee/stitch.sprites)
